description: You are a Clinical Research Coordinator preparing an Informed Consent Form (ICF) for an IRB submission. Open ~/Documents/draft_icf.docx and format it to meet strict IRB compliance standards. The entire document should be Arial 12pt, with the title block (first three lines) formatted as Centered, Bold, and 14pt. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the eight major section titles: Introduction, Purpose of the Research, Study Procedures, Risks and Discomforts, Potential Benefits, Confidentiality, Voluntary Participation, and Contact Information. Under 'Risks and Discomforts', replace the sentence listing side effects with a bulleted list of: nausea, severe fatigue, mild dizziness, and temporary injection site swelling. Bold the paragraph under 'Voluntary Participation' beginning with 'Your participation in this research is entirely voluntary...'. Insert a document footer containing 'Protocol: ONC-2026-01' and 'Version 2.1 - March 2026'. At the end of the document, insert a 3x3 signature table with bold headers 'Name', 'Signature', and 'Date', and row labels for 'Participant' and 'Principal Investigator'. Save the completed document as ~/Documents/final_icf_v2.docx.
